channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: AnalysisEngine Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Logic for filtering, sorting, and refining dead code candidates received from the Supermodel SDK. Architectural overview of the AnalysisEngine domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The entry point and orchestration layer that manages the execution environment and inputs for the GitHub platform. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 5 source files.

item.title: ReportingUtility Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Transforms structured analysis data into human-readable Markdown for communication in PR comments. Architectural overview of the ReportingUtility domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ActionWorkflow — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Handles the main lifecycle from startup to completion within the runner. Architecture documentation for the ActionWorkflow subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: InputValidation — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Sanitizes and validates environment variables and provided action arguments. Architecture documentation for the InputValidation subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
